ideation: This animation sequence depicts a scientist carefully examining something, perhaps through a microscope.  The sequence starts with the arms slightly raised, as if holding an object or adjusting equipment. Then, one arm moves to rest on a surface, while the other arm extends outward as if pointing or gesturing. Finally, both arms return to a neutral position. This sequence emphasizes precision and focused attention, fitting the image of a scientist at work.

frames.beat: arms held forward, ready for work
left arm lowers, right arm reaches out and spins
both arms return to rest, the experiment complete
